text: The mobile app shall display weather forecast for the next 7 days.
The app shall send push notifications for severe weather alerts.
Location services shall request user permission at first launch.
The app shall cache weather data for offline viewing.
The app shall be available for iOS 14 and later.
The inventory dashboard shall update stock levels in real time.
The system shall send a low-stock alert when an item drops below 10 units.
Managers shall approve purchase orders above 5000 EUR.
The dashboard shall display key metrics on a single page.
The CRM shall track customer interactions across email and phone.
The CRM shall integrate with Microsoft Outlook.
Sales reports shall be exported to PDF and Excel.
The CRM shall log all customer touchpoints with timestamp and user.
